fetch_requests.source_hint: guessed from site nav link on homepage line 14

tagline: Delaware-based OEM producing fixed-wing (AP 10 series) and rotorcraft (UVH and ALBATROSS lines) unmanned systems across multiple size classes, plus flight control, ground segment, and ISR payload integration. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence on production maturity, customer base, and program adoption is limited.
